checkpoint.summary: unit_044 complete. PHASE_010 CLOSED. End-to-end integration test TestBatchLogArtifactsEndToEnd in tests/integration/test_invoke_rewrite.py runs compute_parallel_batch -> dispatch_batch -> fake sub-agent commits + sub-agent summary (fabricated inline the way the sub-agent would per the harness-unit contract -- the orchestrator has no code that writes <unit_id>.md) -> merge_batch with a non-trivial validator. Asserts all four log artifacts exist with non-empty bodies: batch.json (JSON-decodable with {batch_id, dispatched_at, batch_plan, fleet}), merge.log ('batch_id: <id>', 'outcome: ok', '- unit_log_a', '- unit_log_b'), validation.log ('validator_ok: True' + validator's verbatim message), and both <unit_id>.md summaries. Also asserts worktrees/<batch_id>/ is pruned after a clean merge while logs/<batch_id>/ survives -- logs are the post-hoc inspection surface. Added missing 'import json' at the top of test_invoke_rewrite.py (caught by the first test run). PHASE_010 summary: unit_041 (checkpoint-template Batch section + 4 tests), unit_042 (/harness-state renders Fleet+Orphans+Timings + 5 tests), unit_043 (log-directory creation in dispatch/merge with two-layer best-effort guarantees + 7 tests, 1 Windows skip), unit_044 (end-to-end integration + 1 test). pr-review-checklist: all four units have validation_evidence; no linter/type errors (stdlib-only); codebase patterns matched; tests pass 222/223 + 1 skip; not deploy-affecting (skill distribution repo); phase doc + checkpoint + state current. PHASE_010 marked completed. Suite 206 -> 222. PHASE_011 begins at unit_bugfix_001 (ISSUE_001 fix: Python-detection in create.md Phase 5 for hook configuration).
checkpoint.next_action: Open PHASE_010 PR (feat/phase-010-observability -> main), run code-review, squash-merge per harness-git.md autonomous-merge authorization. THEN begin PHASE_011 unit_bugfix_001: in skills/development-harness/commands/create.md Phase 5 (Hook configuration), apply the existing Python-detection pattern PY=$(command -v python3 2>/dev/null || command -v python 2>/dev/null) and bake the detected interpreter into the generated .claude/settings.local.json Stop-hook command ("$PY .claude/hooks/continue-loop.py"). Mirror the change for .cursor/hooks.json. Keep the hook script's shebang intact but no longer rely on it. This unblocks Windows installs where neither python3 nor a bare shebang works.
